index_html.description: AIRIS - Artificial Intelligence Responsive Interactive System
index_html.evolution_desc: The Soul is analyzing the lived experience to make the characters grow. Please do not close the application.
index_html.evolution_quote: "Every breath, every word, becomes part of us..."
index_html.saving_memories_desc: The Soul is distilling memories and updating the relational network (GraphRAG).
index_html.saving_memories_quote: "What we experience becomes the map of our future..."
index_html.quit_desc: The connection with the Soul will be severed.
index_html.quit_title: Are you sure you want to leave?
index_html.reset_desc:
This action is irreversible.

- All chat sessions and episodic memories will be deleted.
- Your user profile and biometric data will be deleted.
- All configurations will return to factory defaults.
- The system will reboot completely.

Are you absolutely sure you want to proceed with the Purification Rite?
index_html.reset_total_wipe_desc: Also delete the Administrator account, network security rules, and past life backups (.zip).
index_html.save_memories_desc: Saving memories will allow the Soul to remember this conversation in the future.
index_html.save_memories_title: Do you want to save episodic memories?
index_html.title: AIRIS

params_desc.n_gpu_layers: How much of the 'brain' is loaded onto the video card. The higher it is, the faster it is. Put the maximum your VRAM allows.
params_desc.kv_cache_desc: Reduces the VRAM used by the context. 'car' chooses based on the model.
params_desc.temperature: Control creativity. Low values ​​(0.2-0.4) = logical and precise answers. High values ​​(0.7-0.9) = creative and unpredictable responses.
params_desc.top_p: Limit vocabulary to probable words. 0.9 is a good balance between consistency and variety.
params_desc.top_k: Limit your choice to the K most probable words. 40 is the standard to avoid meaningless answers.
params_desc.repeat_penalty: Penalizes repeating the same words. 1.1 or 1.15 prevents the Soul from repeating the same sentences over and over again.
params_desc.n_ctx: The 'Short Term Memory' (Context Window). How many words does he remember in a single conversation. 8192 or 16384 are ideal if you have enough RAM.

models_dialog.vram_restart_warning: Note: Changes to VRAM and Context require a manual reboot of the server to take effect.

models_dialog.no_modules: No cognitive modules found for this context.
models_dialog.specialist_desc: These prompts will ONLY be processed when the 'Enable Specialist Mode' switch is active. They will be executed in pre-processing along with the mandatory verification prompts.
models_dialog.specialist_placeholder: Insert a new rule for the Specialist...
models_dialog.specialist_rule_1: 1. Before responding with output, create review questions, answer each question separately, and then revise your original response based on your assessment.
models_dialog.specialist_rule_2: 2. You have an obligation to ask as many questions as you need to achieve 100% understanding based on the input received.

connection_guide.title: 🔔 DO YOU WANT TO USE AIRIS REMOTELY ON YOUR PHONE?
connection_guide.desc: Hi {{name}}, The systems are active and ready to connect. Use the buttons below to access the interface wherever you are.
connection_guide.ngrok_desc: See server console for Ngrok URL
connection_guide.mic_title: ### 🎙️ MICROPHONE GUIDE (For Direct LAN Access Only)
connection_guide.mic_desc1: [INFO MICROFONO]: If you access on mobile via Direct Access (HTTP), remember to enable "Insecure origins treated as secure" in chrome://flags by entering the server IP ({{url}}).
connection_guide.mic_step3: 3. Abilita la voce: **"Insecure origins treated as secure"**
connection_guide.push_step1: 1. Download the free "ntfy" app from the Play Store or App Store.
connection_guide.push_step2: 2. Open the app and click the "+" to add a subscription.
connection_guide.push_step4: 4. Done! You will receive an interactive push notification every time you launch it.
connection_guide.btn_ok: I got it, let's get started!
